text.title: A11y Screen Status Tracker Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Does each row map to exactly one screen / URL?

branch.question: Is owner named (not 'team') and last_tested ≤90 days old on every row?
Do all non-pass rows have remediation_url?

text.example: Concrete walk: Faion Web tracker, 12 screens, all per-URL, all named owners, fresh dates, all non-pass linked to issues → publish.
